hero.title: Your Personal Gut Health Plan Is Waiting Inside
hero.subtitle: Get personalized digestion insights based on your habits — what helps, what hurts, and how your gut works differently.
hero.cta: Get My Personal Gut Health Plan

guide.title: Health + Digestive Wellness Guide
guide.text: Discover how your body processes food — and how to work with it, not against it. Your report reveals the patterns behind your digestion, bloating, energy, cravings, and how your gut responds to different foods.
guide.blurText: Discover how your body processes energy – and how to work with it, not against it. Unlock full access to read your complete report.
guide.unlock: Unlock full access to read your complete report.

includes.title: Your Personalized Digestive Health Plan Includes
includes.feature1: Personalized meal plan tailored to your gut type & digestive patterns
includes.feature2: Insights across digestion, metabolism, bloating triggers, sensitivities & nutrient absorption
includes.feature4: Interactive food guide aligned with your bathroom habits
includes.feature5: Balanced Plate Builder for ideal fiber, hydration & gut-friendly foods

Cancel anytime and you won't be charged for the next billing period. Learn more about cancellation and refund policy in Terms of Use. For support, simply let us know support@foodzee.tech

reviews.title: Customers reviews
reviews.review1: The gut health plan finally matched what my body needs. I even discovered which foods were triggering my bloating for years.
reviews.review2: The insights explained my irregular schedule and showed which foods work best for smoother digestion.
reviews.review3: Clear, simple guidance with foods that help my gut. Easy to follow and I noticed results within a week.

guarantee.title: 100% Money-back guarantee
guarantee.text1: At FoodZee we carefully designed our product and strongly believe in its quality. If you don't notice any progress after using the app for at least a week, we are ready to make a complete refund within 21 days.
guarantee.text2: Find more about the applicable limitations in our Terms of Use.

intro.title: Your Tongue Reveals Your Gut Health
intro.subtitle: In Ayurvedic and Traditional Chinese Medicine, the tongue is a mirror of your digestive system. Our AI reads colour, coating and texture — in seconds.

how.title: How to take the perfect scan
how.step1Desc: Stand near a window or turn on a light. Natural light gives the most accurate colour reading.
how.step2Desc: Relax and extend your tongue as far as comfortable. Make sure the whole surface is visible.
how.step3Desc: Best done in the morning before breakfast for the clearest reading.
how.step4Desc: Keep the camera 20–30 cm away. No zoom needed — a clear, well-lit close-up is enough.

camera.deniedSub: Please allow camera access in your browser settings, or use the gallery option below.

results.title: Scan Results
results.insightLabel: What this means for your gut
results.disclaimer: This scan is for informational purposes only and is not a medical diagnosis.

sticky.info: No account needed · 100% private · Photo stays on device
